use_cases: Displaying individual product features on a SaaS landing page
Showcasing service offerings in a grid layout
Highlighting key benefits in marketing sections
Presenting product highlights with call-to-action links
Creating animated feature sections on product pages
ai_summary: A product feature card component that displays an image, title, description, and call-to-action link. Built with Framer Motion for scroll-triggered animations with smooth spring-based transitions. Features hover effects including elevation and shadow changes. Highly customizable through props and CSS class overrides, making it suitable for SaaS landing pages, e-commerce product showcases, and feature demonstration sections.
